rules.rule_text:
rule generic_api
{
	meta:
		author = "@KevTheHermit"
		info = "Part of PasteHunter"
		reference = "https://github.com/kevthehermit/PasteHunter"

	strings:
		$a1 = "apikey" nocase
		$a2 = "api_key" nocase
		$hash32 = /\b[a-fA-F\d]{32}\b/
		$hash64 = /\b[a-fA-F\d]{64}\b/
		$n1 = "#EXTINF"
		$n2 = "m3u8"
		$n3 = "Chocolatey is running"

	condition:
		( any of ( $a* ) ) and ( any of ( $hash* ) ) and ( not any of ( $n* ) )
}
